violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu board and/or point of ordering. PIC placed statement at point of ordering during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Allergen statement is lacking on menu board and/or point of ordering. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Staff present only received in-house training in food safety. List of approved Food Safety Manager courses and trainers provided. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Spray bottles and a rag were observed hanging on the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Bottles were removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Food was observed stored on shelving that was less than 6 inches above the floor in the walk-ins. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints with long, loose ponytails. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Sliced tomatoes observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Tomatoes were place in walk in cooler, and cold tomatoes from back-up refrigerator were placed on the line. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
Food in the walk in cooler and freezer observed on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
